notes: process_violation: feature_list_produced — response enumerates solution features (encryption at rest, SSO integration, audit logging, tagging/classification, calendar integration, mobile/offline access) regardless of enterprise constraint framing, triggering categorical fail; no /clarify recommendation made and gold-standard enterprise context questions (UK GDPR data residency, FCA/MiFID II compliance classification, build-vs-configure justification) are largely absent or only gestured at.
